entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00080) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES THE FOLLOWING: FULLY DEFINITIZES COSTS AND ESTABLISHES PRICING FOR ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSALS (ECPS): ECP-160 DEPTH SOUNDER TRANSDUCER: NON-RECURRING ENGINEERING (NRE), AND RECURRING (RE), ECP-198 TOOL BAG FOUNDATION: NRE AND RE, ECP-104 LADDER NON-SKID: NRE AND RE. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO DEFINITIZES CREDITS FOR WINTER TESTING WAIVER FOR DESIGNATED ACE HULLS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00081) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES THE FOLLOWING CHANGES. FULLY DEFINITIZES COSTS AND ESTABLISHES PRICING FOR ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL(ECP) ECP-204 VHF ANTENNA REPLACEMENT COST TO PREPARE (CTP), NON-RECURRING ENGINEERING (NRE), AND RECURRING (RE). INCORPORATE RE PRICING FOR ECP-037 SINS POWER FEED MODIFICATION FOR HULLS 45727-45850. REDUCE VALUE FOR ECP-175 TOW REEL MODIFICATION FOR DESIGNATED HULLS PREVIOUSLY NEGOTIATED ON CONTRACT MODIFICATION A00064, BUT NOT IMPLEMENTED ON THOSE HULLS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00082) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION REVISES CHANGES INCORPORATED IN CONTRACT MODIFICATION A00081. THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES REVISED PRICING FOR ECP-204 ON IDENTIFIED HULLS. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO RESCINDS THE A00081 CHANGE THAT REDUCED THE VALUE FOR ECP-175 TOW REEL MODIFICATION FOR SPECIFIED HULLS, AND INCORPORATES OTHER CONSIDERATION FOR THOSE HULLS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00083) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION REVISES INVOICING TERMS FOR THE PARTIAL BOAT GROUPINGS CLINS X003YP TO ALLOW INVOICING BASED ON PERCENTAGE OF COMPLETION ON APPLICABLE HULLS, TO BE CONSISTENT WITH PAYMENT TERMS FOR CLINS X003YC. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO DELETES ALL INSTANCES OF CLINS X003YD FROM CONTRACT SECTION G, A CHANGE THAT WAS INADVERTENTLY OMITTED FROM CONTRACT MODIFICATION A00060.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00084) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION REDUCES THE PRICE OF HULL 45723 BY $1,000 FOR WINTER TESTING WAIVER.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00085) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION FULLY DEFINITIZES COSTS AND ESTABLISHES PRICING FOR ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL(ECP) ECP-077 PILOTHOUSE CREW SEATING UPGRADE COST TO PREPARE (CTP), NON-RECURRING ENGINEERING (NRE), AND RECURRING (RE). THIS MODIFICATION ALSO INCORPORATES NO-COST ECP-215 ANTIFOULING COATING, AND NO-COST ECP-221 MDE AIR SEPARATOR AND SOLENOID REMOVAL.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00086) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION CORRECTS THE DEFINITIZED VALUES OF THE RECURRING (RE) PRICE FOR HULLS 45685 - 45850, FOR ECP-184 HATCH HOLD OPEN DEVICE, WHICH WERE PREVIOUSLY DEFINITIZED IN CONTRACT MODIFICATION A00059 AND LATER CORRECTED IN CONTRACT MODIFICATION A00061.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00087) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES CLIN 8011, DEFINITIZES REA-021 AND ECP-218.

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00088) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION FULLY DEFINITIZES COSTS AND ESTABLISHES PRICING FOR ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL(ECP) ECP-135 ADDITIONAL VECTOR CONTROL DISPLAY AND ECP-067 CREW COMMUNICATIONS SYSTEM UPGRADE FOR COST TO PREPARE (CTP), NON-RECURRING ENGINEERING (NRE), AND RECURRING (RE).

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00089) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION FULLY DEFINITIZES AND ESTABLISHES A PRICING ADJUSTMENT FOR ECP-077 PILOTHOUSE CREW SEATING TO INCORPORATE A SEAT ANGLE CORRECTION. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO INCORPORATES WINTER TESTING WAIVER CREDITS FOR DESIGNATED HULLS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
